title: Grid dimension
description: Data pack that makes the overworld a flat grid
body:
## About
Data pack that makes the overworld a flat grid.

## Details
Gray concrete grid framing a white concrete base.  
Elevation is set to 0 in all versions.  
The grid is aligned with the chunk borders.

### Commonized
The commonized version is a playful version that tries to ensure compatibility with the [Checkerboard dimension](https://modrinth.com/datapack/checkerboard-dimension).
